name: calyrex
flavor_texts: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.
Calyrex is known in legend as a king that ruled over Galar in ancient times. It has the power to cause hearts to mend and plants to spring forth.
text: Calyrex is the King Pokémon. It is a psychic and grass-type Pokémon. Abilities: unnerve. Base stats — HP: 100, Attack: 80, Defense: 80, Sp. Atk: 80, Sp. Def: 80, Speed: 80. Evolution line: calyrex. Lore: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore. Calyrex is known in legend as a king that ruled over Galar in ancient times. It has the power to cause hearts to mend and plants to spring forth.
